name: Carlos Gardel
description: Uruguayan singer, songwriter, actor; the most prominent figure in the history of tango
abstract: Carlos Gardel (born Charles Romuald Gardès; 11 December 1890 – 24 June 1935) was a French-born Argentine singer, composer and actor, and the most prominent figure in the history of tango. He was one of the most influential interpreters of popular music in the first half of the 20th century.

about_quotes.speaker: Candido Camero
about_quotes.evidence: Carlos Gardel was very famous then, very famous, very famous. I still have several records of his.
about_quotes.doc_title: Candido Camero — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
